title: SOP Magnetic capture of Echinococcus multilocularis from red fox (Vulpes vulpes) faecal samples: DNA extraction with automatic washing steps
author: Isaksson M
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
OHEJP MEmE 

 This method describes the homogenisation and capture of  Echinococcus  DNA from red fox faecal samples using a magnetic capture method (DNA Fishing) combined with automatic washing steps as described in Isaksson et al 2014. 

  https://parasitesandvectors.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/s13071-014-0583-6  

 Subsequent molecular identification of the captured DNA is described in separate SOPs. There is also a separate SOP for magnetic DNA capture with a manual washing protocol.
